scientific_solution_score.rule: Use reproduced paper-validation metrics and identifier reconciliation.

standard_analysis_score.rule: Use only the explicit IWC RNA-seq plus DESeq2 constraint.

galaxy_execution_score.rule: Use Galaxy-native reanalysis, remote fetch, and provenance.

low_context.Task: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy and validate the reproduction against paper-reported results.
low_context.Prompt: Use the attached manifests to reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy. Recreate the relevant comparisons from the paper, validate the reproduced results against the published summaries, and report one Santana correlation metric, one Wang differential-expression count, one SCF1 fold-change value, and the identifier-mapping method you used.

medium_context.Task: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy and validate the reproduction against paper-reported results.
medium_context.Prompt: Reproduce the Anton et al. 2025 Candidozyma auris RNA-seq reanalysis in Galaxy using the studies and sample groups listed in the attached manifests. Use the paper’s RNA-seq counting and DE analysis stack, reconcile legacy gene identifiers correctly, and report the Santana tnSWI1-vs-AR0382 correlation, the Wang in-vivo DEG count, the Wang in-vitro SCF1 log2 fold change, and the mapping method.

high_context.Task: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy and validate the reproduction against paper-reported results.
high_context.Prompt: In Galaxy, reproduce the Anton et al. 2025 Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis using BioProjects `PRJNA904261` and `PRJNA1086003`, the `GCA_002759435.3` reference, the IWC RNA-seq paired-end workflow followed by `DESeq2`, and `old_locus_tag` to reconcile older identifiers to v3 IDs. Execute the four paper comparisons and report the Santana tnSWI1-vs-AR0382 `R^2`, the Wang in-vivo DEG count, the Wang in-vitro `SCF1` log2 fold change, and the identifier-mapping method.

benchmark_metadata.title: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy

canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all counting and differential expression work occurs in Galaxy

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.santana_tnswi1_r2
expected_result_fields.description: Correlation quality for Santana tnSWI1 vs AR0382

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.wang_in_vivo_deg_count
expected_result_fields.description: Reported DEG count for the Wang in-vivo comparison

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.scf1_log2fc_wang_in_vitro
expected_result_fields.description: SCF1 log2 fold change from the Wang in-vitro comparison

low_context: Infer that the task is a literature-faithful RNA-seq reproduction.
medium_context: Use the paper-listed studies, comparisons, and identifier reconciliation strategy.
high_context: Use the IWC RNA-seq paired-end workflow followed by DESeq2.
Use old_locus_tag to reconcile older published identifiers.

deterministic_checks.description: The task uses the intended four comparison groups from the paper.
The identifier reconciliation method is explicit.

dimensions.name: paper_alignment
dimensions.description: Faithfulness to the paper’s analysis design

dimensions.name: reporting_and_provenance
dimensions.description: Auditability and clarity of the report

reference_answers_source.notes: Reproduction strategy and summary metrics used as the target reference.
